narrative: An 8‑year Staff Machine Learning Engineer at LinkedIn, based in Noida, brings solid product‑company experience and senior‑level expertise. Their standout factor is a JD‑relevant skill match that exceeds the candidate pool average, driving the #34 placement. They have hands‑on work with Haystack and other search infrastructure tools, and have applied PEFT techniques to adapt large language models for information‑retrieval tasks—both core requirements for the Senior AI/ML Search & Retrieval role. The experience level aligns perfectly with the 5‑9 year band, and their Noida location meets the geographic preference. The only caveat is an unknown notice period, which could affect timing.
